## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the narrow problem solved.

## Data and compatibility

- [ ] No personal media, credentials, databases, sidecars, or work files are included.
- [ ] Writable paths, migrations, deletions, downloads, and external tools are explained.
- [ ] Existing tested behavior is preserved or the compatibility change is documented.

## Verification

- [ ] Python compile check
- [ ] Backend unit suite
- [ ] Frontend check
- [ ] Frontend build
- [ ] Relevant runtime/browser smoke pass

List intentionally skipped real-data or network-heavy checks.
